response.global_analysis: Video features a medley of 'Show Them (Who You Are)' and 'All for One'. 'Show Them' uses Indonesian and English; I used on-screen text to confirm and transcribe the Indonesian lyrics accurately. 'All for One' is in English and matches the phonetic structure of the Reference JSON. Timestamps are tightly aligned with vocal audio waveforms to ensure perfect synchronization, with special attention to the fast-paced transitions in 'All for One'.
